Privacy Policy

Medistry, LLC ("Medistry", the “Company”, “we” or “us”), recognize that visitors and users of this website (secure.jobs, the "Website") value their privacy. This Privacy Policy describes the types of personal information we collect through the Website and how that personal information may be used and/or with whom it may be shared.

Please read this Privacy Policy carefully. By using this Website, you agree to the terms outlined here and in our Terms and Conditions.

Consent

You consent to the collection and processing of your information as described. You may withdraw consent at any time by contacting legal@trust.med.

Information We Collect

User Information

This may include your name, email, and other information required to create and manage your account.

Cookies

We use cookies to improve your experience. You can disable cookies in your browser, though some features may not function properly.

Log Data

We collect data such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited to improve our services.

How We Use Information

We use your data to operate, maintain, and improve our platform and communicate with you.

Information Sharing

We do not sell your personal data. We may share it with trusted partners under confidentiality agreements.

Security

We implement reasonable safeguards, but no system is completely secure.

Contact

For questions, contact legal@trust.med.
